events.title: Pelli Chupulu
events.description: Two souls, one destined moment — when we first saw each other in the cherished tradition of Pelli Chupulu, hearts whispered what words couldn't say.

events.title: The Engagement
events.description: Surrounded by the warmth of family and the glow of blessings, we exchanged rings — a sacred promise woven with joy, love, and the cheers of those we hold dearest.

events.title: The Wedding
events.description: The journey of a thousand beautiful tomorrows begins today. Hand in hand, heart in heart — we unite in the most sacred bond of marriage, cherished by family and blessed by the divine.

liveStream.title: LIVE STREAM
liveStream.description:
Join us Online
Ceremony at 6:00 PM

waitingPresence.message: Under the verdant canopy.. amidst the fragrance of mango leaves.. To the soulful rhythm of Nadaswaram.. and the sacred vows of three knots.. As our children unite in the presence of Vedic hymns. We cordially seek your presence and blessings to grace this ceremony.
